acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

params.payout: The amount won (0 if lost). This is the total payout including original bet.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.n: Number of top players to return

returns.players: The addresses sorted by total wagered (descending)

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

allPlayers(uint256).notice: All players who have ever played (for enumeration)

getNetPnL(address).notice: Get net profit/loss for a player (can be negative)

getPlayerStats(address).notice: Get stats for a single player

getWinRate(address).notice: Get player win rate in basis points (10000 = 100%)

isRegistered(address).notice: Whether a player has been registered

recordGame(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Record a completed game for a player

topByBiggestWin(uint256).notice: Get top N players by biggest single win

topByGamesPlayed(uint256).notice: Get top N players by games played

topByWagered(uint256).notice: Get top N players by total wagered

topByWon(uint256).notice: Get top N players by total won
